text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Okay, I think I'll get going.
choice_data_list: What did you three talk about?
What did you three talk about?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Nothing important. I think the last time<n>we met was
when we ate together a<n>couple of days ago.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: We didn't talk about anything special<n>then either.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Just how awful Ticket's test scores<n>were and
how annoyed Hayahide<n>was with Brian. Y'know,
that kinda<n>stuff.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But I'm fine with that. I've never<n>been good at
making conversation<n>anyway.
